build.//note: fix(deploy logs — SecretsUsedInArgOrEnv): switched NIXPACKS → RAILPACK. Nixpacks baked Railway's runtime-only secrets (JWT_SECRET / GROQ_API_KEY / SOCRATA_APP_TOKEN / VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY) into a Docker ENV layer so they persisted in the image (Docker BuildKit flagged it; exposure is bounded — the image is private — but it's the wrong place for them). Railpack supplies secrets via BuildKit secret MOUNTS that never persist in the final image. Build steps declare NO secrets (npm ci + tsc + prisma generate need none). railpack.json replicates the Nixpacks build; openssl for the migrate-deploy schema engine comes from RAILPACK_DEPLOY_APT_PACKAGES=openssl (Railway var). Revert: set builder back to NIXPACKS (nixpacks.toml is retained).

deploy.//note: v96 — baseline 0_init was marked applied against Neon on 2026-05-28; production DB has the v96 schema (User.deletedAt + 4 new indexes). All future schema changes go through prisma migrate dev locally + are applied here via migrate deploy.
